channel.title: 番剧每日新闻RSS
channel.description: 自动聚合：新番、定档、PV、STAFF、CAST、延期资讯 | Auto-updated anime news aggregator

item.title: [动画][PV][CAST][STAFF][公开] Anime News Network Hello, I Am a Witch My Crush Wants Me Make a Love Potion! Anime的 预告 公开 声优阵容, 制作阵容, October Debut

Anime's Teaser Unveils Cast, Staff, October Debut
